title: Quiz: Programming Abstractions
description: Test understanding of quantum API design

questions.question: A fluent interface returns:
questions.explanation: Fluent APIs return self to enable method chaining.

questions.question: Python decorators are useful for:
questions.explanation: Decorators wrap functions to modify their behavior.

questions.question: Context managers handle setup and cleanup automatically.
A quantum DSL (Domain-Specific Language) provides:
questions.explanation: DSLs are tailored to a specific domain like quantum computing.
